compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement performance reviewer delta and build mapping
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create performance reviewer-delta and add tier mapping to build-review-agents.sh.

### Implementation
1. Add performance to _model_for_tier() returning "opus"
2. Add performance to _description_for_tier()
3. Create plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-performance.md with:
   - 8 AI-advantaged performance criteria: DB calls in loops, sequential parallelizable I/O, unbounded accumulation, over-fetching, blocking in async, cache stampede, unnecessary materialization, pool misuse
   - Scrutiny lenses: non-linear complexity, hot paths
   - Bright-line severity: breaks→critical, scales→important, fixed cost→minor
   - Hard exclusion list, anti-manufacturing directive
   - Explicit exclusion of deterministic tool criteria (Ruff PERF, perflint)

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-performance.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] Agent generated with model: opus
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh && grep -q "model: opus" plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-performance.md
- [ ] Delta contains bright-line severity rules
  Verify: grep -c "breaks.*critical\|scales.*important\|fixed cost.*minor" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-performance.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'

comments.body: Fixed: GREEN implementation committed in a06e8c4e
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
